ground_truth.title: How To Sell HR Services - Get More HR Clients
ground_truth.author: GetClients
ground_truth.main_content: Wondering how to sell HR services to employers? Here is some expert HR sales advice from B2B sales expert, Jamie Martin, on selling Human Resources services. Jamie Martin is an award-winning sales professional who is passionate about sales training to help businesses grow by getting better at selling HR services. Jamie joined me on the A Better HR Business podcast to talk about how to map out or define a business's sales process and sales strategy, how to get more clients from LinkedIn now that it is so crowded since the coronavirus pandemic and what's the right way to do messaging on LinkedIn, what's the best way to move someone from a LinkedIn conversation to a phone call, what's the recommended process for consultants to run a sales call on Zoom with a prospective new B2B client, how HR consultants can avoid giving away too much information or planning advice on a sales call, how to handle requests for proposals, and what consulting firms should do if they are not converting enough sales calls into new clients. The podcast highlights include sections on customer buying journey and lead generation, HR business service sales strategy and process analysis, utilizing social media for selling, millennial's buying behaviour, social media activity and engagement to progress a prospect on LinkedIn to a phone call, tips for video conference meetings, and follow-up process.
with: Jamie Martin is an award-winning sales professional who is passionate about sales training to help businesses grow by getting better at selling HR services.
Jamie joined me on the A Better HR Business podcast to talk about how to map out or define a business's sales process and sales strategy.
Many consultants in the HR world love brainstorming, educating, and sharing good ideas but can sometimes give away too much information or planning advice on a sales call.
The recommended process for consultants to run a sales call on Zoom with a prospective new B2B client includes video conference meeting best practices.
If a consulting firm is not converting enough sales calls into new clients, they should review their follow-up process and sales approach.
